home.title: Welcome to Nirvana Biotech
home.subtitle: Leading the way with translational research and innovation — bridging veterinary discovery and human therapeutics.

about.title: About Our Scientific Mission
about.intro: Nirvana is a pioneering biotech firm dedicated to bridging the gap between human medicine and veterinary science.
about.desc: Through advanced molecular research, the company translates breakthrough discoveries from animal health applications into targeted, life-changing clinical therapies for humans.

focusAreas.title: Translational Molecular Research
focusAreas.desc: Utilizing state-of-the-art genomics and molecular biology to understand complex diseases present across both human and animal populations.

focusAreas.title: Veterinary Clinical Applications
focusAreas.desc: Developing advanced therapeutics, diagnostics, and preventative care for companion and livestock health based on robust, cross-species molecular data.

focusAreas.title: Human Therapeutics
focusAreas.desc: Engineering next-generation treatments for chronic diseases, leveraging naturally sourced compounds and insights gained from comparative biology.

advantages.title: Cross-Species Efficacy
advantages.desc: By analyzing biological pathways conserved across species, we rapidly identify, validate, and de-risk treatments before taking them into human trials.

advantages.title: Molecular Innovations
advantages.desc: Moving beyond traditional pharmaceutical approaches to unlock the therapeutic potential of nature-derived molecules and advanced genetic applications.

advantages.title: Holistic Health Pipeline
advantages.desc: Research spans pain management, addiction mitigation, metabolic health, and immunology — benefiting both veterinary and human patients.

innovations.title: Aptamer Engineering Modality
innovations.desc: High-affinity diagnostic platforms built for robust target delivery vectors.

innovations.title: Dengue Neutralizing Antibody Detection Kit
innovations.desc: Using a domestically developed VLP platform and recombinant protein technology, a neutralizing antibody lateral flow test kit is being developed.

innovations.title: Dengue VLP Development and Validation
innovations.desc: Construction: Designing the engineered plasmid with optimized signal sequences for HeLa cell expression.
innovations.fullText:
Construction: Designing the engineered plasmid with optimized signal sequences for HeLa cell expression.

Expression & Purification: Highlighting the transient expression and the successful isolation of spherical, ~39nm VLPs confirmed by TEM.

Immunization: Demonstrating the strong Dengue-1 specific IgG antibody response elicited in a murine model.

research.title: Dengue VLP Development and Production
research.desc: Developing a safer, more effective Dengue vaccine candidate using virus-like particles (VLPs) that mimic the virus without carrying genetic material.
research.fullText:
The Goal: To develop a safer, more effective Dengue vaccine candidate using virus-like particles (VLPs)—structures that look like the real virus but cannot cause infection because they lack genetic material.

The Method: Researchers engineered a plasmid (genetic blueprint) containing Dengue-1 proteins, modified it with genetic signals from the Japanese Encephalitis virus to boost secretion, and grew it in human cells (HeLa cells).

The Results: The process successfully produced spherical VLPs that structurally mirror the native Dengue virus (about 39 nanometers wide). When tested in mice, these VLPs triggered a strong immune response, generating Dengue-1 specific antibodies.

The Takeaway: These HeLa-grown VLPs show strong potential for both new Dengue vaccines and diagnostic testing. The next step will be testing how effectively these antibodies actually protect against the live virus.
